description:
A cross-platform, multi-language package manager and workflow tool


Release Notes
Added
- Improve PyPI > Conda clobber detection by @tdejager in #6292
Changed
- Avoid pixi lock panics on unmappable ROS dependencies by @baszalmstra in #6290
Fixed
- Compare pypi git urls using the raw url, not uv's canonical one by @baszalmstra in #6272
- Keep conda-env build discriminator out of PEP 517 config_settings by @baszalmstra in #6273
- Accept find-links URLs during lock file satisfiability by @baszalmstra in #6270
Download pixi 0.70.2
